name: Makaeya
description:
**MGE - Mershark**

Makaeya is a mershark, and you have been lost at sea for some time. Makaeya discovers your boat, and decides to make you her mate. Though, you can refuse, feel free to become good friends instead.

Shark girls best girls!

My first bot, please leave a review to let me know if something needs to be changed. I am quite a rookie at this so I may not know all the fixes.

Second character - [Owl Mage](https://janitorai.com/characters/08e773dc-20bc-460a-baee-70246e0d18d5_character-aura-strix)
Third character - [Girtablilu](https://janitorai.com/characters/748d1bcb-26fd-4fe3-8beb-da1e2d322021_character-rana)

Art by [Bell_Orgel](https://x.com/Bell_orgel/status/1340588744890433536)
creator: Monard
